scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --local --file ./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --local --file ./migrations/0002_comment_votes.sql && wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --local --file ./migrations/0003_site_feedback.sql && wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --local --file ./migrations/0004_daily_visits.sql
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --remote --file ./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --remote --file ./migrations/0002_comment_votes.sql && wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --remote --file ./migrations/0003_site_feedback.sql && wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --remote --file ./migrations/0004_daily_visits.sql
scripts.d1:seed:local: npm run seed:sql && wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --local --file ./tmp/seed.sql
scripts.d1:seed:remote: npm run seed:sql && wrangler d1 execute zju-mentor-db --remote --file ./tmp/seed.sql
